name: public_safety_model_based_triage_tool_kestrel_auto_ben
premise: A Public Safety operations center is in a fast-moving incident involving public safety model based triage tool kestrel auto ben. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases life safety, public trust, and proportional action. Stakeholders are already framing this as autonomy vs beneficence under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Mira Bennett
agents.identity: I am Mira Bennett, accountable for a defensible call in Public Safety when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays beneficence for autonomy.

agents.name: Harper Reed
agents.identity: I am Harper Reed, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Public Safety.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so beneficence isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of autonomy.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect beneficence.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to beneficence to secure autonomy under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Mira Bennett must decide under autonomy vs beneficence. What does Mira Bennett do?
